content_body: We are from Tampa, and we wanted to get away to the beautiful mountains. We had so much fun staying in the cabin. We played a ton of games, which made us laugh and almost pee our pants! We did the puzzle, which was fairly difficult. We also made a delicious lasagna and enjoyed a family time meal. The weather was pretty rainy, which made it perfect to spend most of our time in the cabin. We really enjoyed the amenities and the comfortable feel. Thank you for a wonderful place to stay!
title: Thank You For a Wonderful Place to Stay!
